name: 苏州
description: Suzhou is a paradise of elegant gardens, silk production, and classical Chinese culture. Known as 'Venice of the East' for its canals and water towns. Home to UNESCO World Heritage classical gardens, intricate silk embroidery, and 2,500 years of history. A cultural gem between Shanghai and Nanjing.
highlights: Tiger Hill - Ancient pagoda and hill

climate.tips: Best in spring (April-May) for garden flowers or autumn (Sept-Nov) for pleasant weather. Summer is hot and humid. Winter is cold but gardens are beautiful in snow. Plum blossoms in winter.

attractions.name: 拙政园
attractions.description: The largest and most famous classical Chinese garden, a UNESCO World Heritage site representing garden art at its peak.
attractions.tips: Arrive before 8am to avoid tour groups. Audio guide essential. Combine with nearby Suzhou Museum. Best in early morning or late afternoon.

attractions.name: 留园
attractions.description: A masterpiece of Ming dynasty garden design, UNESCO World Heritage site known for its sophisticated architecture and layout.
attractions.tips: Smaller than Humble Administrator but considered more refined. Morning visits best for light. Excellent details in rock arrangements.

attractions.name: 虎丘
attractions.description: An ancient hilltop with the famous Leaning Pagoda, historic temples, and legendary tombs dating back 2,500 years.
attractions.tips: Legend says buried treasures under the pagoda. Walk to the top for views. Spring for flowers. Can be combined with Shantang Street.

attractions.name: 山塘街
attractions.description: A classic 1,200-year-old canal street with traditional shops, teahouses, and beautiful night views.
attractions.tips: Best at night when illuminated. Take a boat ride. Try local snacks. Less crowded than Pingjiang Road.

attractions.name: 平江路
attractions.description: A preserved historic district with canal views, traditional residences, and charming shops along 1.6km of waterways.
attractions.tips: Less commercialized than Shantang. Combine with nearby Humble Administrator's Garden. Morning for photography, evening for atmosphere.

attractions.name: 苏州博物馆
attractions.description: A modern architectural masterpiece by I.M. Pei showcasing Suzhou's 2,500-year history and culture.
attractions.tips: Free but need to book online. Book 2+ days ahead on official WeChat. Combine with Humble Administrator's Garden which is across the street.

attractions.name: 周庄
attractions.description: A famous water town with 900 years of history, featuring ancient bridges, canal boat rides, and preserved Ming/Qing architecture.
attractions.tips: Visit early morning before tour buses. Stay for night lighting. Buy tickets at tourism center. Combine with Tongli water town.

attractions.name: 同里
attractions.description: A peaceful water town with 15 canals, 49 ancient bridges, and 67 heritage gardens and residences.
attractions.tips: Less crowded than Zhouzhuang. Start at Tuisi Garden. Evening is peaceful. Can cycle between water towns.

attractions.name: 观前街
attractions.description: Suzhou main pedestrian shopping street with century-old shops and temples.
attractions.tips: Try local snacks along the street.

attractions.name: 灵岩山寺
attractions.description: Ancient Buddhist temple on a scenic hill with beautiful gardens.
attractions.tips: Climb the hill for views.

attractions.name: 网师园
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage garden known for its intimate scale and elegant design.
attractions.tips: Famous for night performances.

attractions.name: 乾隆皇帝花园
attractions.description: Riverside garden with imperial connections and scenic views.
attractions.tips: Less crowded than major gardens.

attractions.name: 陆巷古村
attractions.description: Well-preserved Ming dynasty village on Dongting Lake.
attractions.tips: Combine with Dongting Lake visit.

attractions.name: 苏州戏曲博物馆
attractions.description: Museum showcasing Kunqu opera, UNESCO intangible heritage.
attractions.tips: Watch a performance if possible.

attractions.name: 盘门景区
attractions.description: Ancient city gate and water gate from the Song dynasty.
attractions.tips: Beautiful at sunset.

attractions.name: 玄妙观
attractions.description: Taoist temple in the heart of Suzhou with bustling market.
attractions.tips: Good for souvenir shopping.

attractions.name: 寒山寺
attractions.description: Famous Tang dynasty temple known for the poem Mooring at Maple Bridge.
attractions.tips: Visit on New Year for bell ringing.

attractions.name: 苏州丝绸博物馆
attractions.description: Museum showcasing Suzhou 5000-year silk history and production.
attractions.tips: Buy silk products nearby.

attractions.name: 苏州园林博物馆
attractions.description: First museum dedicated to classical Chinese gardens in China.
attractions.tips: Good introduction before garden visits.

attractions.name: 园林之路
attractions.description: Scenic route connecting major classical gardens of Suzhou.
attractions.tips: Buy garden pass for savings.

attractions.name: 狮子林
attractions.description: 元代古典园林，以假山著称，园内太湖石峰林立，形似狮子，故名狮子林。乾隆皇帝曾六次游览并仿建于颐和园。
attractions.address: 苏州市姑苏区园林路23号
attractions.tips: 假山群像迷宫一样，建议慢慢探索。和拙政园距离很近，可以一起游览。

attractions.name: 苏州中心
attractions.description: 苏州工业园区的地标性建筑群，拥有华东地区最大的购物中心之一。建筑设计现代时尚，屋顶花园可俯瞰金鸡湖全景。
attractions.address: 苏州市工业园区星港街
attractions.tips: 傍晚时分可以欣赏金鸡湖日落和音乐喷泉。

attractions.name: 金鸡湖
attractions.description: 苏州工业园区内的人工湖，是全国最大的城市内湖之一。湖畔有文化艺术中心、摩天轮、月光码头等景点，是苏州现代休闲的代表。
attractions.address: 苏州市工业园区金鸡湖景区
attractions.tips: 周五和周末晚上有音乐喷泉表演。环湖骑行非常惬意。

attractions.name: 沧浪亭
attractions.description: 苏州最古老的园林，始建于北宋，是世界文化遗产。以假山为中心，园内古木参天，复廊漏窗精美，是文人雅士的精神家园。
attractions.address: 苏州市姑苏区沧浪亭街3号
attractions.tips: 游客比其他园林少，可以安静欣赏。与可园相邻，可以一起游览。

attractions.name: 耦园
attractions.description: 世界文化遗产园林，因住宅居中、东西各有一花园而得名。布局对称独特，寓意夫妻恩爱，是苏州园林中爱情主题的代表。
attractions.address: 苏州市姑苏区小新桥巷6号
attractions.tips: 适合情侣游览。游客较少，拍照不用排队。

attractions.name: 网师园夜花园
attractions.nameEn: Master of Nets Garden Night Show
attractions.description: 网师园夜间开放的特色文化体验，园内各厅堂分别上演评弹、昆曲、古筝等传统艺术表演，游客在月色下赏园听曲，别有韵味。
attractions.address: 苏州市姑苏区阔家头巷11号
attractions.tips: 只在4-10月开放，建议提前购票。体验苏州传统文化的绝佳方式。

attractions.name: 退思园
attractions.description: 位于同里古镇的世界文化遗产园林，建于清光绪年间。布局紧凑精致，贴水而建，是晚清园林艺术的杰作。
attractions.address: 苏州市吴江区同里古镇
attractions.ticketPrice: 含在同里古镇联票100元内
attractions.tips: 建议购买同里古镇联票。清晨游客少，拍照效果好。

attractions.name: 苏州工业园区
attractions.description: 中国和新加坡合作建设的现代化园区，拥有众多世界500强企业。园区规划先进、环境优美，代表了苏州现代发展的一面。
attractions.tips: 可以参观城市规划展示馆了解园区发展历程。

attractions.name: 陆巷古村
attractions.description: 太湖东山半岛上的千年古村，是明代宰相王鏊的故乡。村中保存有大量明清古建筑，鹅卵石小巷纵横交错，古朴宁静。
attractions.address: 苏州市吴中区东山镇陆巷村
attractions.tips: 建议和东山景区一起游览。春天可以采摘碧螺春茶叶。

attractions.name: 白马涧龙池
attractions.description: 苏州西部的自然生态景区，有龙池、凤潭等天然水潭，四周群山环抱、植被茂密。是苏州市民周末登山亲水的好去处。
attractions.address: 苏州市虎丘区枫桥街道
attractions.tips: 夏天可以玩水。建议穿运动鞋，带足饮用水。

attractions.name: 威尼斯小镇
attractions.description: 苏州工业园区内仿威尼斯风格建造的商业街区，有小桥流水、贡多拉游船和欧式建筑。是拍照打卡和休闲购物的好去处。
attractions.address: 苏州市工业园区圆融时代广场
attractions.tips: 傍晚灯光亮起后最有氛围。可以和金鸡湖一起游览。

attractions.name: 天平山
attractions.description: 苏州著名的赏红叶胜地，秋天枫叶如火，与北京香山、南京栖霞山、长沙岳麓山并称中国四大赏枫胜地。
attractions.tips: 11月中旬至12月初是最佳赏枫期。周末人非常多，建议工作日前往。

attractions.name: 木渎古镇
attractions.description: 有2500多年历史的江南水乡古镇，乾隆六次到访之地。镇上有严家花园、虹饮山房等名园，还有古戏台和传统手工艺。
attractions.tips: 可以乘坐游船游览香溪。和天平山、灵岩山可以一日联游。

attractions.name: 苏州乐园
attractions.description: 苏州老牌主题乐园，有各种游乐设施和表演。近年来进行了升级改造，增加了水上乐园和夜间灯光秀。
attractions.tips: 夏天水上乐园开放。周末和节假日人多，建议提前购票。

attractions.name: 北寺塔
attractions.description: 苏州古城的标志性建筑，始建于南朝梁代，塔高76米，是苏州最高的古塔。登塔可俯瞰苏州古城全景，远眺园区现代天际线。
attractions.address: 苏州市姑苏区人民路1918号
attractions.tips: 塔内楼梯较陡，注意安全。与苏州博物馆距离不远。

attractions.name: 黎里古镇
attractions.description: 吴江区保存最完好的古镇之一，有近千年历史。镇上廊棚连绵、河道纵横，保存有大量明清建筑，比周庄同里更为宁静。
attractions.tips: 游客较少，适合喜欢安静古镇的旅行者。从苏州市区可乘公交到达。

attractions.name: 浒墅关古镇
attractions.description: 京杭大运河畔的千年古镇，历史上是重要的商贸关口。镇上保存有古运河码头、老街和传统民居，是了解运河文化的好去处。
attractions.address: 苏州市虎丘区浒墅关镇
attractions.tips: 可以沿运河散步，感受运河两岸的生活气息。

attractions.name: 虞山
attractions.description: 常熟市的标志性山脉，海拔263米，山上有言子墓、仲雍墓等古迹。登顶可俯瞰常熟全城和尚湖，是常熟最著名的自然景观。
attractions.tips: 可以和尚湖景区一起游览。秋天红叶很美。

attractions.name: 尚湖
attractions.description: 常熟市的天然湖泊，湖面广阔、水质清澈。湖畔有尚湖公园，春天牡丹盛开时是华东地区最大的牡丹观赏地。
attractions.tips: 4-5月牡丹花会期间最值得游览。可以和虞山一起安排。

attractions.name: 沙溪古镇
attractions.description: 太仓市保存完好的古镇，有1300多年历史。镇上老街保存完好，临水建筑、古桥、寺庙构成典型的江南水乡风貌，游客稀少非常安静。
attractions.tips: 游客非常少，可以悠闲地逛古镇。从太仓市区可乘公交到达。

attractions.name: 苏州植物园
attractions.description: 位于上方山脚下的大型植物园，收集有各类植物2000余种。园内有月季园、杜鹃园、竹园等专类园区，是市民休闲和科普教育的好去处。
attractions.tips: 春天花季最美。可以和上方山国家森林公园一起游览。

attractions.name: 上方山国家森林公园
attractions.description: 苏州城西的天然氧吧，山上有楞伽寺塔等古迹。春天樱花和梨花盛开，秋天红叶满山，是苏州人周末登山的好去处。
attractions.address: 苏州市虎丘区横塘街道
attractions.tips: 3-4月樱花季最美。建议穿登山鞋，带足饮用水。

attractions.name: 苏州酒文化博物馆
attractions.description: 展示苏州悠久酿酒历史的主题博物馆，可以了解桂花酒、黄酒等苏州传统酒类的酿造工艺，还能免费品尝各种美酒。
attractions.tips: 可以买到正宗的苏州桂花酒作为伴手礼。

attractions.name: 狮山公园
attractions.description: 苏州高新区的大型市民公园，以狮山湖为中心。园内有樱花大道、儿童乐园和健身步道，是周边居民休闲的主要场所。
attractions.tips: 3-4月樱花季最美。晚上灯光效果很好。

attractions.name: 西塘古镇
attractions.description: 位于吴江区的千年古镇，以烟雨长廊和古弄堂闻名。是电影《碟中谍3》取景地，夜景尤为迷人，酒吧街热闹非凡。
attractions.tips: 建议住一晚体验夜景和清晨的宁静。避开节假日人流高峰。

attractions.name: 大阳山国家森林公园
attractions.description: 苏州最大的国家级森林公园，植被覆盖率高，空气清新。有植物园、文殊寺等景点，是城市近郊的天然氧吧。
attractions.address: 苏州市虎丘区阳山环路
attractions.tips: 适合全家出游。建议穿运动鞋，带足水和食物。

attractions.name: 苏州滨江公园
attractions.description: 沿太湖岸线建设的湿地公园，有观鸟台、亲水平台和骑行绿道。是观赏太湖日落和湿地生态的好地方。
attractions.address: 苏州市吴中区太湖新城
attractions.tips: 傍晚日落最美。骑行爱好者的好去处。

attractions.name: 重元寺
attractions.description: 阳澄湖畔的大型佛教寺院，有水上观音阁，供奉33米高观音像。寺院建筑宏伟，环境清幽，是苏州最大的佛教道场之一。
attractions.address: 苏州市工业园区阳澄岛
attractions.tips: 可以和阳澄湖大闸蟹美食结合。秋冬季节阳澄湖风光最美。

attractions.name: 太湖湿地公园
attractions.description: 太湖边的大型湿地公园，有水上森林、芦苇荡和观鸟区。乘坐游船穿梭于湿地水道之间，可以近距离观察各种水鸟。
attractions.address: 苏州市虎丘区镇湖街道
attractions.tips: 秋冬季节候鸟最多。建议乘坐游船游览。

attractions.name: 可园
attractions.description: 苏州唯一的书院式园林，始建于清代，园内有学古堂、浩歌亭等建筑。与沧浪亭隔街相望，小巧精致，是文人读书讲学之所。
attractions.address: 苏州市姑苏区沧浪亭街
attractions.tips: 游客很少，可以安静欣赏。建议和沧浪亭一起游览。

restaurants.name: 得月楼
restaurants.description: Legendary restaurant established 1779 serving authentic Suzhou cuisine with classic dishes.

restaurants.name: 松鹤楼
restaurants.description: Historic restaurant established 1871, famous for traditional Suzhou cuisine and cooking demonstrations.

restaurants.name: 协和菜馆
restaurants.description: Local favorite for authentic Suzhou home cooking in traditional courtyard setting.

restaurants.name: 老苏州茶楼
restaurants.description: Traditional teahouse serving authentic Suzhou breakfast snacks and local tea in classic setting.

restaurants.name: 同得兴
restaurants.description: Legendary noodle shop serving classic Suzhou-style noodles with fresh ingredients.

restaurants.name: 绿杨馄饨
restaurants.description: Famous for delicate Suzhou-style wonton dumplings in light broth, a local institution.

restaurants.name: 平江路小吃
restaurants.description: Various street food vendors along historic Pingjiang Road serving local snacks and treats.

restaurants.name: 悬慈巷蟹粉小笼
restaurants.description: Popular local spot famous for crab roe xiaolongbao and authentic Suzhou dim sum.

restaurants.name: 老庆台
restaurants.description: Famous for authentic Suzhou cuisine with valley views.

restaurants.name: 水乡人家
restaurants.description: Local favorite with canal views and traditional dishes.

restaurants.name: 苏州酒家
restaurants.description: Historic restaurant with traditional atmosphere.

restaurants.name: 江南名厨
restaurants.description: Modern take on traditional Jiangnan cuisine.

restaurants.name: 太湖三白
restaurants.description: Fresh seafood from Tai Lake including white shrimp.

restaurants.name: 苏帮菜馆
restaurants.description: Traditional Su cuisine in classic courtyard.

restaurants.name: 观前素菜馆
restaurants.description: Buddhist vegetarian cuisine near temple.

restaurants.name: 糖粥铺子
restaurants.description: Famous for Suzhou-style sweet porridge and desserts.

restaurants.name: 老北京涮肉
restaurants.description: Northern style lamb hotpot popular with locals.

restaurants.name: 状元楼
restaurants.description: Historical restaurant with scholar theme.

restaurants.name: 太湖船菜
restaurants.description: Dining on a boat on Tai Lake with fresh seafood.

restaurants.name: 拙政园茶室
restaurants.description: Traditional teahouse with garden views.

restaurants.name: 山塘街小笼
restaurants.description: Local spot for authentic Suzhou xiaolongbao.

restaurants.name: 桃花源记
restaurants.description: Upscale Jiangnan cuisine in poetic setting.

restaurants.name: 狮子林素面
restaurants.description: Famous noodle shop near the garden.

arrival.to: Suzhou Railway Station / Suzhou North Station / Suzhou Park Station
arrival.tips: High-speed from Shanghai is fastest. Suzhou Station is closest to old town. Suzhou North is for some high-speed trains.
Buses from Shanghai's Hongqiao and Puma are comfortable. Bus Station is near old town.

boat: Good way to see water towns
bike: Mobike, Ofo, and Hello Bike apps work

hotels.name: 苏州老城墙饭店
hotels.bookingTips: Book well ahead. Request canal view room.

hotels.name: 苏州香格里拉大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best location for first-time visitors. Check weekend rates.

hotels.name: 苏州南园宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Former residence of Chiang Kai-shek. Book garden view rooms.

hotels.name: 平江府酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Renovated historical building. Best for romantic getaways.

hotels.name: 观前街酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Great for shoppers. Many chain hotels available.

hotels.name: 平江路民宿
hotels.bookingTips: Book well ahead for best rooms.

tips: Works at all restaurants and shops

culturalTips.title: Garden Etiquette
culturalTips.content: Suzhou's classical gardens are UNESCO sites. Walk quietly, don't touch plants. Morning visits offer best photos and fewer crowds. Each garden tells a philosophical story.

culturalTips.title: Silk Culture
culturalTips.content: Suzhou is famous for silk production. Visit silk factory to see weaving demonstrations. Real silk costs more - bargain at markets. Embroidery is another famous craft.

culturalTips.title: Suzhou Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Suzhou food is lighter and sweeter than Shanghai. Must-try: Song Shu (squirrel-shaped mandarin fish), Wusong duck, and crab dishes in season. Eat breakfast at traditional teahouses.

culturalTips.title: Water Town Visits
culturalTips.content: Zhouzhuang and Tongli are the main water towns. Zhouzhuang is more famous but crowded. Tongli is quieter. Go early morning. Combine two in one day is rushed.

culturalTips.title: Greeting Etiquette
culturalTips.content: Greet with both hands pressed together slightly鞠躬 is traditional. Handshakes also acceptable. Address people by title and surname.

culturalTips.title: Dining Customs
culturalTips.content: Wait for host to start eating. Leave some food on plate to show you are full. Tapping chopsticks is considered rude.

culturalTips.title: Dress Code
culturalTips.content: Smart casual for restaurants. Remove shoes when entering homes and some traditional buildings. Cover shoulders at temples.

culturalTips.title: Shopping and Bargaining
culturalTips.content: Bargaining expected at markets. Start at 30-40% of asking price. Be friendly but firm. Most fixed-price shops have reasonable prices.

culturalTips.title: Language Tips
culturalTips.content: Mandarin is official. Suzhou dialect is soft and melodic. Learn basic phrases: 你好 (hello), 谢谢 (thank you), 请问 (excuse me).

culturalTips.title: Getting Around
culturalTips.content: Suzhou is bike-friendly with flat terrain. Metro is efficient. Didi works well. Walking in old town reveals hidden gems.

culturalTips.title: Photography Ethics
culturalTips.content: Ask permission before photographing people. Some temples prohibit photography inside. Flash may damage ancient artifacts.

culturalTips.title: Silk Shopping Guide
culturalTips.content: Real silk costs more. Check for certification. Silk fabric is sold by the meter. Haggle at markets but not at branded stores.

culturalTips.title: Garden Visitation
culturalTips.content: Arrive early (7:30-8:00) to avoid tour groups. Humble Administrator and Lingering are most famous. Garden pass saves money.

culturalTips.title: Best Seasons
culturalTips.content: Spring (April-May) for flowers and pleasant weather. Autumn (Sept-Nov) for chrysanthemums and cool evenings. Summer is hot and humid.

culturalTips.title: Tea Culture
culturalTips.content: Suzhou is famous for Biluochun tea. Visit tea houses for authentic experience. Best tea shops are near the gardens.

culturalTips.title: Kunqu Opera
culturalTips.content: Kunqu opera is Suzhou most famous performing art. Watch a performance at the Kunqu Museum or in gardens at night.

culturalTips.title: Water Town Etiquette
culturalTips.content: When visiting water towns like Zhouzhuang, be respectful of local residents. Do not block doorways or photograph interiors without permission.

emergencyContacts.nameEn: First Affiliated Hospital of Soochow University

emergencyContacts.name: 美国驻上海总领事馆
emergencyContacts.notes: For US citizens in Suzhou region

quickFacts.water: Tap water safe after boiling; bottled water recommended
